title: Implement secure MCP server
goal: Expose authorized MCP tools for AI agents to interact with profile, projects, blog content, and selected admin workflows.
scope: Create Go MCP server using official MCP Go SDK.
Expose get_profile, list_projects, get_project, list_blog_posts, get_blog_post, search_content, get_site_context.
verification: MCP read-only tools work with valid token.
No tool can execute shell commands or read arbitrary files.
notes: Implemented streamable HTTP MCP transport with the official MCP Go SDK.
Added read/admin bearer token roles and Origin validation.
Added read tools for profile, projects, blog posts, search, and compact site context.
Added admin-only create_draft_post and moderate_comment tools with audit_log writes.
Added unit tests for auth, Origin validation, read tools, admin tool rejection, and dangerous tool allowlist.
Added optional SQLStore integration test for real PostgreSQL mapping.
